rewardId.title: Streamer.bot-owned Twitch Reward ID
rewardId.description: Right-click the reward in Streamer.bot and copy its stable Reward ID.

baseRewardTitle.title: Available reward title
baseRewardTitle.description: Used when a season or crown is reset. Twitch permits at most 45 characters.

holderTitleTemplate.title: Crown-holder reward title
holderTitleTemplate.description: Token: {name}. The rendered result is safely limited to 45 characters.

roundingIncrement.title: Round the next price up to

resetEachStream.title: Reset the crown and price when Twitch goes live
resetEachStream.description: Monthly leaderboard totals remain intact. Leave disabled to let the crown persist across streams.

blockCurrentHolder.title: Require another viewer to challenge the current holder

userCooldownMinutes.title: Per-viewer capture cooldown (minutes)
userCooldownMinutes.description: Zero disables the additional cooldown. The current-holder rule is applied separately.

allowBroadcaster.title: Allow the broadcaster to capture the crown

allowModerators.title: Allow moderators to capture the crown

announceCaptures.title: Announce successful captures in Twitch chat

captureMessageTemplate.title: Capture message
captureMessageTemplate.default: {name} captured the Fan Crown for {cost} points! Next challenge: {nextCost}.

rejectedMessageTemplate.title: Refund message
rejectedMessageTemplate.description: Tokens: {name}, {reason}. Leave disabled above to reduce chat noise.
rejectedMessageTemplate.default: {name}, that Fan Crown redemption was refunded: {reason}.

announceMonthlyWinner.title: Announce the completed monthly season winner

monthlyWinnerMessageTemplate.title: Monthly winner message
monthlyWinnerMessageTemplate.default: {name} won the {month} Fan Crown season with {points} points and {captures} captures!

showCrownCard.title: Show the hosted Fan Crown overlay card
